---
title: "FutureTech"
author: "MIT FutureTech"
date: "2026-02-26"
date-added: "2026-03-02"
categories: [AI, computing, economics]
status: to-read
url: "https://futuretech.mit.edu/"
---

MIT FutureTech is an interdisciplinary group studying the foundations of progress in computing and AI, with research spanning technical trends and their economic impacts.

[Read the full article →](https://futuretech.mit.edu/)
